commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow env-clear and test repair in the existing PR branch.; Needs attention: The PR stages OAuth token material for an external subprocess, and an inherited Gemini encrypted-storage env can still bypass those staged credentials.; Review finding: [P1] Clear encrypted Gemini credential storage env — extensions/google/cli-backend.ts:16 (sha=57713614654dd143c64b558c813e944c32479335)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards selected `google-gemini-cli` OAuth profiles into the Gemini CLI subprocess by refreshing the profile, staging Gemini-compatible credentials in an isolated home, clearing conflicting Google Cloud auth env vars, and adding focused auth bridge tests.

PR surface: Source +225, Tests +210. Total +435 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head plus upstream Gemini CLI source shows that `GEMINI_FORCE_ENCRYPTED_FILE_STORAGE=true` makes `fetchCachedCredentials` use `OAuthCredentialStorage` instead of the staged `oauth_creds.json`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow env-clear and test repair in the existing PR branch.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
